shots.caption: Recorded live during Market Bubble.
shots.narration: This was recorded live during Market Bubble. Bubblewire puts Twitch at fazebanks, YouTube at notthreadguy, X filtered posts, and the Market Bubble X Live rule in one proof-backed feed.

shots.caption: Live evidence for Twitch, YouTube, and X. X Live is waiting honestly.
shots.narration: The proof strip is honest: Twitch, YouTube, and X have live evidence; X Live is live and waiting for broadcast replies instead of faking traffic.

shots.caption: YouTube comments from notthreadguy land in the same feed.
shots.narration: Filtering shows YouTube comments from notthreadguy beside the rest of the room, with source labels and event types intact.

shots.caption: Search and source filters keep the operator in control.
shots.narration: Search and source filters let an operator find the market thread, isolate a platform, and keep the whole audience in context.

shots.caption: Streamer Mode turns the feed into a glanceable live desk.
shots.narration: Streamer Mode turns the same feed into a second screen: the top question, mood, volume, trends, and open questions stay readable at a glance.

shots.caption: The overlay builder keeps every source explicit.
shots.narration: Overlay setup makes the aggregator broadcastable. It keeps Twitch, YouTube, X, X Live, and Kick as explicit source switches, with size, fade, and alignment controls.

shots.caption: OBS gets the conversation without dashboard chrome.
shots.narration: The OBS overlay carries live rows without dashboard chrome, so producers can put the conversation directly on stream.

shots.caption: The moment. The proof. The broadcast.
shots.narration: For this Market Bubble run, Bubblewire captures the moment, the proof, and the broadcast in one customizable aggregator.
